title: EB-Required CI Debt Clearance
description: Cleared CI infrastructure debt blocking Ectropy Business roadmap validation: luhtech-schema meta-schema discriminator fix (schema vs instance classification), roadmap-sync ajv --strict=false for all validate steps, service-exchange.enum.json registration via -r flag in roadmap-validate, and .gitignore log debris cleanup. These fixes were required for EB roadmap CI to run clean.

outputs.description: luhtech-schema validate.py meta-schema discriminator fix — classifies schema vs instance by meta-schema field rather than $id presence — PR #41.
acceptanceCriteria: luhtech-schema validate correctly distinguishes schema files from instance files

outputs.description: roadmap-sync.yml --strict=false added to all ajv validate steps — PR #49. Resolves pre-existing Validate Roadmap Files failures.
acceptanceCriteria: All ajv validate calls in roadmap-sync.yml carry --strict=false
Roadmap Sync CI green on main

outputs.description: service-exchange.enum.json registered via -r flag in roadmap-validate workflow — PR #51.
.gitignore with *.log entry to prevent log file debris — PR #50.
acceptanceCriteria: .gitignore exists at repo root with *.log entry

preMerge: luhtech-schema validate correctly classifies after meta-schema fix
postMerge: Roadmap Sync CI green on main

transitions.trigger: CI failures on EB roadmap validation identified; debt clearance arc dispatched
Individual fix branches created across tooling and CI scope
Final PR (#51 service-exchange enum) merged; all CI debt cleared
Post-merge: Roadmap Sync CI green; EB roadmap validates clean

notes: Multi-PR deliverable: fix/validate-path-instance-classification-2026-05-29 (#41, a4a80d1e), fix/roadmap-sync-ajv-strict-mode-2026-05-30 (#49, 8a689dd2), chore/gitignore-log-debris-2026-05-30 (#50, c512047e), fix/roadmap-validate-add-r-service-exchange-enum-2026-05-31 (#51, 9dfbc3c1). scope.branch reflects the representative PR branch for the CI strictness fix (#49). S6-staged omitted — multi-PR arc with no single staging event. Decision-log workflow schema fix (PR #53, 26e14ea3) is a related but separate fix filed as part of the broader Roadmap Sync failure; not included in this deliverable scope as it was identified after this arc closed.
